title: Department Manager Vacancy at Liberty Shoes - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Liberty Shoes - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes:
Liberty Shoes is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes!
